last_result: Cycle 45 complete. SI #36 GCRSC CONFIRMED as structural theorem (0.75). Explicit three-premise structure: (1) Latent property condition — P not directly observable; (2) Iterative adversarial optimization — ¬P adversary over T > 1 steps; (3) CR-structured criteria — CR(C,P) = structural constraint on ¬P achievable performance. Proof: domain substitution in SI #35 (replace RTO->P, CPP->CR). No I-training-specific premises used. Circularity objection resolved: CR defined independently via constitutive analysis (performing well requires having P), not circularly as 'whatever is compute-robust.' Scope conditions: (a) one-shot adversaries out of scope, falls back to SI #28; (b) observable P trivializes adversarial gap. D4 streak 40 milestone: calibration checkpoint. New mean: 0.711 (36 confirmed SIs). Tight clustering [0.70-0.76] noted — partially explained by inquiry maturation (later SIs are derived theorems with greater internal consistency). Residual anchoring concern flagged for monitoring.
